use_cases: Hero section background with animated wave effects for visual impact
Landing page decorative element to add motion and depth
Abstract backdrop for creative portfolios and artist showcases
Loading screen or transition animation for web applications
Ambient visual for entertainment or gaming-related landing pages
ai_summary: A Three.js WebGL shader component that renders animated wave patterns using custom vertex and fragment shaders. The effect combines time-based cosine warping with gradient coloring to create flowing, cosmic-looking wave animations. Uses u_time and u_resolution uniforms for smooth, continuous animation and proper scaling across different screen sizes.
